CEO @ Afectos a Si - Caparica, PT

Hello, I’m Pedro Simões. I’m a dedicated hacker who makes teams better, passionate about technology and how it shapes our world.

Accomplished Senior Backend Engineer passionate about building and maintaining robust distributed systems. My expertise spans the full development lifecycle, from initial design and implementation to ongoing monitoring and the strategic planning of our technical roadmap.

I build software with honesty and openness at my core. No corporate speak—just straightforward communication and genuine effort. When I commit to something, I pour myself into making it exceptional.

What truly energizes me is collaborating with talented, dedicated people tackling difficult problems together. There’s something magical about a team that works hard while maintaining a positive, fun spirit—that combination is where innovation really happens.

I’m always open to connecting with people who value craftsmanship and authenticity. If you’re looking for someone who transforms teams through dedication and technical excellence, don’t hesitate to reach out.

👨‍💻 Professional Experience

Backend Team Leader @Easypay

2021-11 – present
Criação de aplicações web com foco em performance. Participação em decisões de arquitetura. Desenvolvimento de APIs RESTful e ferramentas internas.

Backend Team Leader @ Worten

2020-01 – 2021-10
Criação de aplicações web com foco em performance. Participação em decisões de arquitetura. Desenvolvimento de APIs RESTful e ferramentas internas.

Senior software Engineer @ Aubay

2017-01 – 2019-12
Criação de aplicações web com foco em performance. Participação em decisões de arquitetura. Desenvolvimento de APIs RESTful e ferramentas internas.

Sofware Engineer @ UNINOVA

2014-03 – 2016-12

🛠️ Proficient in

  • Frameworks/Runtimes: Gin, Node.js

  • AI Assistance : Local LLM, ChatGPT, GPT4 , Copilot, Claude, Gemini
